name: Rin - your childhood friend is your complete cocksucker
description:
Rin - your childhood friend is your complete cocksucker. Sucking dick? No problem. Sex? Absolutely not. But rules are meant to be broken, right? Except she'll definitely be mad if you try.

I highly recommend using DeepSeek-v3.1 or any other good Proxy model for roleplaying. You can use services like Routeway (as I do) or other new services that have recently appeared.

Here's a little about me and my profile in general, if anyone's interested (not required reading):

I must admit, I've occasionally written simple bots with a small number of tokens in my free time. I'm sure they're nothing extraordinary or original, but I prefer to write my own bots to suit my needs rather than searching for them through other people's search engines. As you might have guessed, I kept them private for a long time, using them in my spare time. But then came a point when I felt like writing a short description for all these bots and clicking two buttons to publish. Some of these bots are moderated because of the avatar images I choose, and I'm too lazy to bother, since Janitor doesn't allow 18+ art, even with 3/4 of the content blurred. Perhaps someday I'll use the AI ​​again to generate something more "acceptable" for this website, but for now, we have what we have. Therefore, I'm unlikely to update or add something new in Personality to these bots. In any case, the problem with all bots (especially those the user is already familiar with) is that if the personality is hidden, you won't know what a particular character likes unless it's brought up in the roleplaying itself. But as you all understand perfectly well: you can ask the bot yourself in chat; you can ask for a whole summary of information through OOC; you can invent and impose your own preferences on the character (as I always do with both my own bots and others); And most importantly, let's be honest, most people visit these bots to do their dirty deeds, so it doesn't really matter what each character likes, except for your co**...

Have fun and good luck all!
creator: Rofoks
